x-enumeration-literals.name: Activity Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records the actions, operations, and tasks performed during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transaction Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records financial or operational transactions processed during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Performance Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that captures operational performance metrics such as response time, throughput, or processing volume.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records errors, failures, warnings, or abnormal events encountered during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records traceable operational events, user actions, and compliance-related information for audit purposes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Security Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that captures authentication events, access activities, security violations, or threat detections during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Usage Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records system, channel, or user utilization statistics during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Communication Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records exchanged messages, interactions, or communication activities during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reconcilation Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records comparison and balancing results between processed records or systems during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records settlement instructions, settlement status, and finalized positions during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Clearing Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records clearing activities, matched transactions, and clearing positions during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Netting Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records offsetting calculations and resulting net obligations during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monitoring Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records operational monitoring information, alerts, and system health indicators during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records regulatory checks, policy validations, and compliance assessment results during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records identified risks, exposures, thresholds, or risk evaluation results during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Interaction Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records customer inquiries, requests, interactions, or servicing activities handled during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Operational Status Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records the operational state, availability, and condition of systems or services during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incident Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records operational incidents, disruptions, escalations, and resolution activities during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Position Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A report that records balances, positions, liquidity, or financial exposure information during the session.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Summary Session Report
x-enumeration-literals.description: A consolidated report providing an overview of key session activities, results, and outcomes.
